name: Chicken Mole
recipeIngredient: 1 3-1/2 lb chicken, cut into serving pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange chicken in a large pot.
2. Add stock and cook until tender but not falling apart, 1 to 1-1/2 hours.
3. Lift chicken out of the stock and cool slightly. Reserve the stock.
4. Process tortillas, raisins, chocolate, almonds, onion, bell pepper, tomato, and garlic in a food processor or blender until finely ground.
5. Add enough stock to make a thick gravy-like sauce.
6. Add crushed chile and cinnamon.
7. Pour the sauce into a large pot.
8. Add chicken pieces and simmer for 30 minutes. If moisture becomes too dry, add more stock.
9. Serve hot with rice.
